title: ceratostylis formicifera
intro: Ceratostylis formicifera, also known as the ant orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ceratostylis formicifera include treating various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
